verses.t: In the second year of Dareyawesh the sovereign, in the sixth month, on the first day of the month, the Word of HWHY came by Ḥaggai the prophet to Zerubbaḇel son of She’alti’ĕl, governor of Yahuḏah and to Yahusha son of Yehotsaḏaq, the high priest, saying, HWHY
“Thus spoke of hosts, saying, ‘This people have said, “The time has HWHY not come, the time the House of is to be built.” ’ ” HWHY
Then the Word of came by Ḥaggai the prophet, saying,
“Is it time for you yourselves to dwell in your panelled houses and this House be in ruins?” HWHY
And now, thus said of hosts, “Consider your ways!

“You have sown much, but brought in little; eat, but do not have enough; drink, but you are not filled with drink; clothe yourselves, but no one is warm; and he who earns wages, earns wages to put into a bag with holes.” HWHY
Thus said of hosts, “Consider your ways!
Go up to the mountain and you shall bring wood and build the House. And I will be pleased with it and let Me be HWHY. esteemed,” said

“When you looked for much, then see, it came to little. And when you brought it home, I would blow on HWHY it. Why?” declares of hosts. “Because of My House which lies in ruins, while each of you runs to his own house.
“Therefore the heavens above you have withheld the dew and the earth has withheld its fruit.

“And I called for a drought on the land and on the mountains and on the grain and on the new wine and on the oil and on whatever the ground brings forth and on man and on livestock and on all the labour of the hands.”

Then Zerubbaḇel son of She’alti’ĕl and Yahusha son of Yehotsaḏaq, the high priest, with all the remnant of the HWHY people, obeyed the voice of their Elohim and the words of Ḥaggai HWHY the prophet, as their Elohim had sent him. And the people feared the HWHY. presence of
And Ḥaggai, the messenger of HWHY, HWHY spoke the message of to the people, saying, “I am with you, HWHY.” declares HWHY

And stirred up the spirit of Zerubbaḇel son of She’alti’ĕl, governor of Yahuḏah and the spirit of Yahusha son of Yehotsaḏaq, the high priest and the spirit of all the remnant of the people. And they came and worked on the HWHY House of of hosts, their Elohim,
on the twenty-fourth day of the sixth month, in the second year of Dareyawesh the sovereign.
In the seventh month, on the twenty HWHY first of the month, the Word of came by Ḥaggai the prophet, saying,
“Speak, please, to Zerubbaḇel son of She’alti’ĕl, governor of Yahuḏah and to Yahusha son of Yehotsaḏaq, the high priest and to the remnant of the people, saying,
‘Who is there left among you who saw this House in its former esteem? And how do you see it now? Is it not in your eyes as naught when compared to it?

‘And now, be strong, Zerubbaḇel,’ HWHY. declares ‘And be strong, Yahusha, son of Yehotsaḏaq, the high priest. And be strong, all you people of HWHY, the land,’ declares ‘and work. HWHY For I am with you,’ declares of hosts –
the Word that I covenanted with you when you came out of Mitsrayim and My Spirit is remaining in your midst, do not fear!’ HWHY
“For thus said of hosts, ‘Once more, in a little while and I am shaking the heavens and earth, the sea and dry land.
‘And I shall shake all the nations and they shall come to the Delight of all the nations and I shall fill this House with HWHY esteem,’ said of hosts.
‘The silver is Mine and the gold is HWHY Mine,’ declares of hosts.
‘Let the esteem of this latter House HWHY be greater than the former,’ said of hosts. ‘And in this place I give peace,’ HWHY declares of hosts.”
On the twenty-fourth of the ninth month, in the second year of HWHY Dareyawesh, the Word of came unto Ḥaggai the prophet, saying, HWHY
“Thus said of hosts, ‘Now, ask the priests concerning the Torah, saying,
“If one bears set-apart meat in the fold of his garment and with the edge he touches bread or stew, or wine or oil, or any food, is it set-apart?” ’ ” And the priests answered and said, “No.”
And Ḥaggai said, “If someone defiled by a dead body touches any of these, is it defiled?” And the priests answered and said, “It is defiled.”
And Ḥaggai answered and said, “ ‘So is this people and so is this nation before HWHY, Me,’ declares ‘and so is every work of their hands. And whatever they bring near there is defiled.
‘But now, please consider, from this day onward: Before a stone was laid on a HWHY, stone in the Hĕḵal of
since those days – one came to a heap of twenty ĕphahs and there were ten; one came to the winepress to draw out fifty baths from the press and there were twenty –
‘I smote you with blight and mildew and hail in all the labours of your hands and their was none of you with Me,’ HWHY. declares
‘Consider now from this day forward, from the twenty-fourth day of the ninth month, from the day that the foundation HWHY of the Hĕḵal of was laid, consider it:
‘Is the seed yet in the storehouse? And until now the vine and the fig tree and the pomegranate and the olive tree have not yielded fruit! From this day on I shall bless you!’ ”
And a second time the Word of HWHY came to Ḥaggai on the twenty- fourth day of the month, saying,
“Speak to Zerubbaḇel, the governor of Yahuḏah, saying, ‘I am shaking the heavens and earth.

‘And I shall overturn the throne of reigns. And I shall destroy the might of the gentile reigns, and overturn the chariots and their riders. And the horses and their riders shall come down, each by the sword of his brother. HWHY
‘In that day,’ declares of hosts, ‘I shall take you, Zerubbaḇel My servant, son of She’alti’ĕl,’ declares HWHY, ‘and shall make you as a signet, for I have chosen you,’ declares HWHY of hosts.”
